languages.text: Машина воспряла от упадка, в котором пребывала последние века, и вновь наполнена Движущей Силой.
The machine has recovered from the decadence in which it has lain in previous centuries, and is once again filled with conductive charge.
languages.original_text: Машина воспряла от упадка, в котором пребывала последние века, и вновь наполнена Движущей Силой.

traits.locale_text: The machine has recovered from the decadence in which it has lain in previous centuries, and is once again filled with conductive charge.
The machine has recovered from the decadence in which it has lain in previous centuries, and is once again filled with conductive charge.
The machine has recovered from the decadence in which it has lain in previous centuries, and is once again filled with conductive charge.

languages.text: この機械は、過去数世紀にわたる衰退から回復し、再び導電性電荷で満たされている。
languages.original_text: The machine has recovered from the decadence in which it has lain in previous centuries, and is once again filled with conductive charge.

languages.text: Makine, geçmiş yüzyıllarda içinde bulunduğu çöküşten kurtulup bir kez daha iletken şarjla dolu hâlde.
languages.original_text: The machine has recovered from the decadence in which it has lain in previous centuries, and is once again filled with conductive charge.

traits.locale_text: Makine, geçmiş yüzyıllarda içinde bulunduğu çöküşten kurtulup bir kez daha iletken şarjla dolu hâlde.

languages.text: 机械已从过去数个世纪的沉沦中苏醒，导能电荷再度充盈其间。
languages.original_text: The machine has recovered from the decadence in which it has lain in previous centuries, and is once again filled with conductive charge.

traits.locale_text: 机械已从过去数个世纪的沉沦中苏醒，导能电荷再度充盈其间。

languages.text: Die Maschine wurde aus der Dekadenz geborgen, in der sie seit Jahrhunderten gelegen hatte, und ist nun aufs Neue von leitender Entladung erfüllt.
languages.original_text: The machine has recovered from the decadence in which it has lain in previous centuries, and is once again filled with conductive charge.

traits.locale_text: Die Maschine wurde aus der Dekadenz geborgen, in der sie seit Jahrhunderten gelegen hatte, und ist nun aufs Neue von leitender Entladung erfüllt.

languages.text: Débarrassée de la décadence dans laquelle elle était plongée depuis plusieurs siècles, la machine est de nouveau gorgée de charge conductrice.
languages.original_text: The machine has recovered from the decadence in which it has lain in previous centuries, and is once again filled with conductive charge.

traits.locale_text: Débarrassée de la décadence dans laquelle elle était plongée depuis plusieurs siècles, la machine est de nouveau gorgée de charge conductrice.

languages.text: Esta máquina se ha recuperado de siglos de decadencia y vuelve a alojar una carga conductiva.
languages.original_text: The machine has recovered from the decadence in which it has lain in previous centuries, and is once again filled with conductive charge.

traits.locale_text: Esta máquina se ha recuperado de siglos de decadencia y vuelve a alojar una carga conductiva.
